name: Nextcloud
short_desc: Self-hosted file sync and share with web file manager, mobile/desktop clients, and shareable links.
author: Nextcloud GmbH
description: Nextcloud is an open-source file sync and share platform — a self-hostable alternative to Dropbox, Google Drive, and OneDrive. This package focuses on its core file-management capability: a polished web file browser, granular share permissions (link / user / group), public share links with passwords and expiry, full versioning and trash, server-side encryption, and end-to-end clients for macOS / Windows / Linux / iOS / Android. Other optional Nextcloud apps (Calendar, Contacts, Mail, Talk, Office, etc.) can be enabled post-install from the admin UI. The package bundles Postgres 16 and Redis 7 for the application database and file-locking cache.

form_fields.label: Admin Username
form_fields.hint: Login name for the first administrator account. Created on first boot.

form_fields.label: Admin Password
form_fields.hint: Password for the admin account. Pick something strong; you can change it from the user settings page after install.

form_fields.label: Postgres Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated password for the bundled Postgres `nextcloud` role.
